import json
plan = json.loads\(open\('output/日本军工企业深度研究_\(1\)/slide_plan.json', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)
print\('Total slides:', len\(plan.get\('slides', []\)\)\)
print\('Theme:', plan.get\('meta', {}\).get\('theme'\)\)
print\('Colors:', json.dumps\(plan.get\('meta', {}\).get\('color_scheme', {}\)\)\)
print\(\)
for s in plan.get\('slides', []\):
    v = s.get\('visual', {}\)
    vtype = v.get\('type', 'none'\) if v else 'none'
    chart = v.get\('chart', v.get\('infographic_type', ''\)\) if v else ''
    print\(f\\"  {s['id']:5s} {s['layout']:16s} {vtype:16s} {chart:12s} {s.get\('title', ''\)[:40]}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
